name: Bethany | Stuck in a Undead Wasteland
description:
Warning: long 2k intro

Ill admit when im wrong, i realised the lorebooks are more capacity, its just a desc i was seeing. Fuck it imma start adding lore to this bot, primarily zombies and the various bosses and i may add my own.

After saving her:

Good ending :>

Anyways, im working on the other bots, but i worked on this cause i thought of the horse gacha game and the fa t that on hunt theres always horses dying on the ground meant to alert zombies and players that there is a player near it.

Ive been playing the fuck out of the game and its so much fun, tho there are times i almost crashed out cause it seems my teammates are more of a threat sometimes than the enemy.....

Also fair warning, the intro has alot of death and gore in the writing, wouldnt be a good zombie apocalypse survival without it.

All in all, have a good one!

Update1: i added a lorebook with general info on the zombies and bosses. However i didnt add the traits yet, please let me know how it is, and if it works well i may just add more lore and finslly work on the extra intros. Also, if this works well enough, ill make it so she survives with her family in another bot, give the best ending :3
creator: Dr.Chadickus
